name: Title: French Onion Soup Coca-Cola
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add onions and cook until they are golden in color, but do not brown them.
3. Stir in the beef broth, Coca-Cola, salt, vinegar, and pepper.
4. Cover and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Toast French bread slices in a broiler.
6. Turn the bread and sprinkle generously with Parmesan cheese.
7. Toast until the bread is browned.
8. Serve the soup in deep bowls topped with the toast, cheese side up.
9. Makes 4 servings or about 6 cups.
